items.name: Bashing
items.description: Shield can be used as a +1 weapon (size up for damage).

items.name: Blinding
items.description: On a successful shield bash, target is blinded for 1d4 rounds (Fort DC 14 negates).

items.name: Fortification (Light)
items.description: 25% chance to negate critical hits and sneak attacks.

items.name: Fortification (Moderate)
items.description: 75% chance to negate critical hits and sneak attacks.

items.name: Fortification (Heavy)
items.description: 100% chance to negate critical hits and sneak attacks.

items.name: Glamered
items.description: On command, armor appears as normal clothing.

items.name: Reflecting
items.description: Once per day, reflect a spell back at caster (as spell turning).

items.name: Slick
items.description: +5 competence bonus to Escape Artist checks.

items.name: Wild
items.description: Armor moves with wild shape; does not interfere with polymorph.

items.name: Bane
items.description: +2 attack and +2d6 damage vs. chosen creature type.

items.name: Brilliant Energy
items.description: Passes through non-living matter; ignores armor and shield AC. Doesn't affect undead or constructs.

items.name: Dancing
items.description: Flies and attacks on its own for 4 rounds as a swift action (once per 4 rounds).

items.name: Defending
items.description: Transfer enhancement bonus to AC (up to +5) each round as a free action.

items.name: Disruption
items.description: Undead struck must pass DC 14 Will save or be destroyed.

items.name: Distance
items.description: Ranged weapon doubles its range increment.

items.name: Flaming Burst
items.description: +1d6 fire damage; on a crit +1d10 (×2) or +2d10 (×3) fire.

items.name: Ghost Touch
items.description: Can strike incorporeal creatures as if it had ghost touch property.

items.name: Keen
items.description: Doubles the threat range (keen edge effect).

items.name: Merciful
items.description: +1d6 nonlethal damage; all damage becomes nonlethal (on command).

items.name: Mighty Cleaving
items.description: Allows an additional Cleave attempt per round.

items.name: Returning
items.description: Thrown weapon returns to hand immediately after attack.

items.name: Seeking
items.description: Ranged weapon ignores miss chance due to concealment (not total concealment).

items.name: Speed
items.description: One extra attack per round at the highest attack bonus (haste).

items.name: Thundering
items.description: +1d8 sonic on a crit; target must DC 14 Fort or be deafened.

items.name: Vicious
items.description: +2d6 damage but wielder also takes 1d6 damage on a hit.

items.name: Vorpal
items.description: On a natural 20 that deals damage, severs the target's head.

items.name: Wounding
items.description: Each hit causes 1 point of bleed (stacks).

items.name: Potion of Enlarge Person
items.description: Enlarges humanoid, +2 Str, −2 Dex, −1 attack/AC. 1 min.

items.name: Potion of Reduce Person
items.description: Reduces humanoid, −2 Str, +2 Dex, +1 attack/AC. 1 min.

items.name: Potion of Invisibility
items.description: Invisible for 3 min or until attack.

items.name: Potion of Protection from Evil
items.description: +2 deflection to AC & resistance to saves vs. evil. 1 min.

items.name: Potion of Spider Climb
items.description: Climb at 20 ft, no Climb checks needed. 3 min.

items.name: Potion of Haste
items.description: Extra attack, +1 attack/AC/Ref, +30 ft speed. 5 rounds.

items.name: Potion of Heroism
items.description: +2 morale to attacks, saves, skill checks. 50 min.

items.name: Potion of Gaseous Form
items.description: Becomes gas cloud. Fly 10 ft. 5 min.

items.name: Potion of Remove Disease
items.description: Cures all diseases afflicting the drinker.

items.name: Ring of Force Shield
items.description: On command: +2 shield bonus to AC.

items.name: Ring of Jumping
items.description: Continuous jump spell; +5 competence to Acrobatics (jump).

items.name: Ring of Sustenance
items.description: Need only 2 hr sleep; no food or water required.

items.name: Ring of Counterspells
items.description: Absorbs one specific spell; automatically counterspells it once.

items.name: Ring of Mind Shielding
items.description: Immune to detect thoughts, discern lies, alignment detection.

items.name: Ring of Spell Storing (Minor)
items.description: Stores up to 3 spell levels; can be released by wearer.

items.name: Ring of Regeneration
items.description: Regenerate 1 HP/round; regrow lost limbs in 1d6×10 min.

items.name: Ring of Three Wishes
items.description: 3 charges; each grants a wish spell.

items.name: Rod of Absorption
items.description: Absorbs spells as they are cast; can expend absorbed levels as spell slots (max 50 levels).

items.name: Rod of Alertness
items.description: +1 perception, +1 initiative. Creates alarm and anticipate teleportation in 20-ft radius on command.

items.name: Rod of Cancellation
items.description: Touch drains an item of all magical properties (Will DC 23 negates for attended items). Single use.

items.name: Rod of Extend Metamagic (Lesser)
items.description: 3 charges/day; metamagic: Extend on spells of 3rd level or lower.

items.name: Rod of Extend Metamagic
items.description: 3 charges/day; Extend on spells of 6th level or lower.

items.name: Rod of Empower Metamagic (Lesser)
items.description: 3 charges/day; Empower on spells 3rd level or lower.

items.name: Rod of Maximize Metamagic (Lesser)
items.description: 3 charges/day; Maximize on spells 3rd level or lower.

items.name: Rod of Quicken Metamagic (Lesser)
items.description: 3 charges/day; Quicken on spells 3rd level or lower.

items.name: Rod of Flailing
items.description: On command: free action extra attack with full attack bonus; used as a +3 flail/dire flail. 50 charges.

items.name: Rod of Lordly Might
items.description: Functions as +2 through +6 weapon depending on mode; six combat functions plus detect evil, fear, light.

items.name: Rod of Metamagic, Heighten
items.description: 3 charges/day; Heighten on spells of 3rd level or lower.

items.name: Rod of Security
items.description: Transport up to 199 creatures to a paradise demiplane; 200 days max stay.

items.name: Rod of Splendor
items.description: Raiment of noble splendor +4 Cha. Summons magnificent pavilion. 1 use/day each.

items.name: Rod of Thunder & Lightning
items.description: 5 special functions: lightning, thunder, thunderclap, lightning strike, thunderstorm. 50 charges.

items.name: Rod of the Python
items.description: Becomes a giant constrictor snake on command; 50 charges.

items.name: Rod of the Viper
items.description: +2 heavy mace; on command head becomes viper—bite deals 1d4+2 plus poison (DC 14, 1d4 Con).

items.name: Rod of Withering
items.description: Deals 1d4 Str and 1d4 Con on touch attack (Fort DC 17 negates). 50 charges.

items.name: Staff of Charming
items.description: Charm person (1 charge), charm monster (2 charges).

items.name: Staff of Fire
items.description: Burning hands (1), fireball (2), wall of fire (3).

items.name: Staff of Frost
items.description: Ice storm (2), cone of cold (4), wall of ice (4).

items.name: Staff of Healing
items.description: Cure light (1), cure serious (2), cure critical (3), lesser restoration (2), CMW (2).

items.name: Staff of Necromancy
items.description: Cause fear (1), ghoul touch (1), halt undead (1), enervation (3), waves of fatigue (3).

items.name: Staff of Power
items.description: +2 quarterstaff. Fireball, lightning bolt, magic missile, cone of cold, levitate, dispel magic, globe of invuln. (varied charges). Retributive strike on breaking.

items.name: Staff of Size Alteration
items.description: Enlarge person (1), reduce person (1), mass enlarge (3), mass reduce (3).

items.name: Staff of the Magi
items.description: +2 quarterstaff. 22 spells (varied charges); absorbs spells targeted at wielder. Retributive strike on breaking.

items.name: Staff of Woodlands
items.description: +2 quarterstaff. Barkskin (2), speak with animals (1), wall of thorns (3), animate plants (5), summon nature's ally VI (6).

items.name: Wand of Web
items.description: 20-ft radius web; Ref DC 14 or entangled.

items.name: Wand of Slow
items.description: Slows up to 6 creatures, Will DC 14.

items.name: Wand of Haste
items.description: Haste on one creature for 5 rounds.

items.name: Headband of Vast Intelligence +2
items.description: +2 enhancement to Int. Grants bonus language or skill ranks.

items.name: Helm of Telepathy
items.description: Detect thoughts and telepathy at will; 1/day suggestion.

items.name: Helm of Underwater Action
items.description: Breathe underwater; vision 60 ft through water.

items.name: Amulet of Proof against Detection
items.description: Immune to all detect spells, scrying, location effects.

items.name: Necklace of Adaptation
items.description: Breathe in any environment; immune to airborne toxins and gases.

items.name: Periapt of Health
items.description: Immune to disease and filth fever.

items.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
items.description: Automatically stabilize, immune to bleed. Double natural healing.

items.name: Belt of Physical Perfection +2
items.description: +2 enhancement to Str, Dex, and Con.

items.name: Robe of Bones
items.description: 6 hidden undead (skeletons/zombies); animates when removed from robe.

items.name: Robe of Eyes
items.description: All-around vision, darkvision 120 ft, see invisible, see through darkness.

items.name: Robe of Blending
items.description: Change appearance to look like another creature type.

items.name: Robe of Useful Items
items.description: Various useful patches that can be torn off and activated.

items.name: Robe of the Archmagi (White)
items.description: AC +5 armor, SR 18, +4 saving throws, +2 CL. Good-aligned arcane casters.

items.name: Robe of the Archmagi (Gray)
items.description: Same as white. Neutral arcane casters.

items.name: Robe of the Archmagi (Black)
items.description: Same as white. Evil arcane casters.

items.name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
items.description: On command: hypnotize creatures in 30 ft (Will DC 19 negates).

items.name: Bead of Force
items.description: Thrown; creates 10-ft sphere of force on target (5d6 dmg, Ref DC 16). Lasts 10 min.

items.name: Brooch of Shielding
items.description: Absorbs up to 101 HP of magic missiles.

items.name: Vest of Escape
items.description: +6 Escape Artist; 1/day open locks (picks any lock).

items.name: Eyes of Doom
items.description: 2/day: one creature shaken, 2 creatures frightened, or 3 panicked (Will DC varies).

items.name: Goggles of Minute Seeing
items.description: +5 competence to Craft checks and Perception (fine detail).

items.name: Lenses of Detection
items.description: +5 competence to Perception; find tracks as per find traps.

items.name: Boots of Speed
items.description: Haste for up to 10 rounds/day (free action to activate).

items.name: Boots of the Winterlands
items.description: Endure cold; move at full speed on ice/snow; resist cold 10.

items.name: Winged Boots
items.description: Fly (good) for 5 min/day, usable in 1-minute increments.

items.name: Gloves of Arrow Snaring
items.description: 2/day catch an arrow, bolt, or thrown weapon targeting you.

items.name: Gloves of Reconnaissance
items.description: 10 min/day: view through solid surfaces up to 1 ft thick.

items.name: Sniper Goggles
items.description: No range penalty on ranged sneak attacks; range penalty halved.

items.name: Cloak of Arachnida
items.description: Climb 20 ft, web 1/day, poison immunity, resist cold 5.

items.name: Cloak of the Bat
items.description: +5 Stealth; blindsense 20 ft; become bat at will.

items.name: Bag of Tricks (Tan)
items.description: 3/day draw out a random small animal (d% table).

items.name: Bag of Tricks (Gray)
items.description: 3/day draw out a random medium animal.

items.name: Bag of Tricks (Rust)
items.description: 3/day draw out a random large animal.

items.name: Candle of Invocation
items.description: Aligned casters in 30 ft: +2 CL, gate 1/day while burning. 4-hr duration.

items.name: Crystal Ball
items.description: Scrying as the spell at will.

items.name: Crystal Ball with Telepathy
items.description: Scrying; telepathic communication with scried target.

items.name: Cube of Force
items.description: 36 charges; creates force wall/cube with various options.

items.name: Daern's Instant Fortress
items.description: On command becomes a 20-ft high iron tower (10 ft wide).

items.name: Deck of Illusions
items.description: 34 cards; each creates a major image of a specific creature.

items.name: Deck of Many Things
items.description: 22 cards with wildly varied effects (XP, wishes, allies, doom).

items.name: Efreeti Bottle
items.description: Summons an efreeti who grants 3 wishes (1,001 service days).

items.name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Golden Lions)
items.description: Two lion figurines; 1/week each, for up to 1 hr.

items.name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Obsidian Steed)
items.description: Nightmare; 3/month for up to 24 hr. Carries rider to ethereal plane.

items.name: Folding Boat
items.description: Folds to a box (12 in); opens to small boat or large ship.

items.name: Handy Haversack
items.description: 80 lbs / 12 cu ft; always produces desired item.

items.name: Horn of Blasting
items.description: Sonic shout: 30-ft cone, 5d6 sonic, DC 15 Fort or stunned 1 round, deafened 2d6 rounds.

items.name: Horn of Goodness/Evil
items.description: 3/day change alignment of weapon for 7 minutes.

items.name: Horseshoes of the Zephyr
items.description: Horse floats 4 in above ground; no difficult terrain; speed +30 ft.

items.name: Ioun Stone (Vibrant Purple Prism)
items.description: Stores 3 spell levels (as ring of spell storing).

items.name: Iron Flask
items.description: Trap outsiders; command them as servant.

items.name: Lantern of Revealing
items.description: Reveals invisible creatures in its light; 30 ft.

items.name: Lyre of Building
items.description: Negates damage from battering for 30 min; 100 workers for 3 days.

items.name: Mirror of Life Trapping
items.description: Traps creatures in extradimensional cells (max 12). Will DC 23 negates.

items.name: Portable Hole
items.description: Circular cloth opens 10-ft deep extradimensional hole, 6 ft diameter.

items.name: Rope of Climbing
items.description: Animates; 50 ft rope moves and knots on command.

items.name: Rope of Entanglement
items.description: On command entangles up to 6 creatures (Ref DC 15 or entangled).

items.name: Scarab of Protection
items.description: SR 20; absorbs up to 12 death or negative energy spells.

items.name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
items.description: +1 luck to ability checks and saving throws.

items.name: Well of Many Worlds
items.description: 3 ft cloth; opens a two-way gate to a random plane. 1/day for 1 min.
